sections.paragraph: pr.n. (perhaps i.q. הָרֹון mountainous, comp. Arab. هارون), Aaron, the elder brother of Moses, Exo 6:20 7:7 consecrated high priest by his brother, Exo 29:1-46 Lev 8:1-36 בְּנֵי אַהֲרֹון “sons of Aaron,” Jos 21:4, 10 Jos 21:10, 13 Jos 21:13and poet. בֵּית אַהֲרֹון “the house of Aaron,” Psal. 115:10 , 12 Psa 115:12 118:3 used for the priests, just as Aaron, Psa 133:2, is used for any high priest.
